TrafficLog.title: Traffic Log
TrafficLog.description: A record of a network request and its security analysis.

id.description: Unique identifier for the log entry.

payload.description: JSON payload of the request if applicable.

threatLevel.description: Assessed threat level by the IDS.

threatType.description: Type of threat detected (e.g., SQL Injection).

analysis.description: Detailed AI analysis of the threat.

SystemStats.title: System Stats
SystemStats.description: Aggregated statistics for the IDS dashboard.

/logs.description: Collection of all captured and analyzed traffic logs.

/stats/current.description: Singleton document for real-time dashboard statistics.
